items.english: I live in a big house.
She lives in a small apartment.
My house is beautiful.
Our house is near the sea.
In front of the house there is a big door.
The door is dark brown.
Above the door there is a small number.
Next to the door there is a window.
The window is open.
The window has white curtains.
The roof of the house is red.
The roof is high.
The house has a small balcony.
On the balcony there is one chair.

items.maltese: Xi kultant noqgħod fuq il-gallarija filgħodu.
items.english: Sometimes I stay on the balcony in the morning.
Behind the house there is a garden.
The garden is clean and beautiful.
In the garden there are trees and flowers.
In the garden there is a small table.

items.maltese: Nixrob kafè fil-ġnien meta t-temp ikun sabiħ.
items.english: I drink coffee in the garden when the weather is nice.

items.maltese: Fuq barra d-dar hemm dawl isfar.
items.english: Outside the house there is a yellow light.
The outside wall is white.
The garage is under the house.
There is one car in the garage.
The garage door is grey.
In front of the garage there is a quiet street.

items.maltese: Id-dar ta' nannuwi għandha ġnien kbir.
items.english: My grandparents' house has a big garden.
My house does not have a garage.
Our apartment has a beautiful balcony.
From the window I can see the street.
From the window I can see the sea.

items.maltese: Inħobb id-dar tiegħi għax hija komda.
items.english: I like my home because it is comfortable.

items.maltese: Id-dar hija żgħira, imma hija sabiħa ħafna.
items.english: The house is small, but it is very beautiful.

items.maltese: Filgħaxija d-dawl ta' barra jkun mixgħul.
items.english: In the evening the outside light is on.
In the kitchen there is a big table.
In the kitchen there is a white fridge.
There are four chairs in the kitchen.
The kitchen is clean and beautiful.
We eat in the dining room.
In the dining room there is a long table.
The dining room is near the kitchen.
In the living room there is a comfortable sofa.
In the living room there is a big television.
We watch television in the living room.
In the living room there is a big window.
My bedroom is small.
There is one bed in the bedroom.
There is a big wardrobe in the bedroom.
There is a lamp on the bedside table.
The bedroom is very quiet.
I sleep in the bedroom every night.

items.maltese: Il-kamra tal-banju hija żgħira imma nadifa.
items.english: The bathroom is small but clean.
There is a mirror in the bathroom.

items.maltese: Fil-kamra tal-banju hemm sink u doċċa.
items.english: In the bathroom there is a sink and a shower.
I brush my teeth in the bathroom.
My study has a small desk.
In the study there is a laptop and books.
I work in the study in the morning.
I read a book in the study in the evening.
The corridor is long and narrow.
From the corridor you can go to the kitchen.
From the corridor you can also go to the living room.

items.maltese: Il-kċina hija l-kamra favorita ta' ommi.
items.english: The kitchen is my mother's favourite room.
The living room is the biggest room in the house.

items.maltese: Il-kamra tas-sodda tiegħi għandha tieqa kbira.
items.english: My bedroom has a big window.
We eat together in the dining room.

items.maltese: Kull kamra fid-dar għandha dawl tajjeb.
items.english: Every room in the house has good light.
The table is in the kitchen.
The table is brown.
There is a book on the table.
There is a cup on the table.
The chair is next to the table.
I have six chairs in the dining room.
The sofa is very comfortable.
The cat sleeps on the sofa.
In front of the sofa there is a small table.
My bed is big.
The blanket is on the bed.
Two pillows are on the bed.
The wardrobe is next to the bed.
I have many clothes in the wardrobe.
The wardrobe door is closed.
The lamp is on the bedside table.
The lamp is yellow.
In the evening I switch on the lamp.
The desk is in front of the window.
There is a laptop on the desk.
I work at my desk every day.
The fridge is in the kitchen.
There is milk and cheese in the fridge.
The fridge is new.
The shelf is on the wall.
There are books on the shelf.
There is a small plant on the shelf.
The mirror is in the bathroom.
The mirror is big and clean.
I see my face in the mirror.
The curtains are next to the window.
The television is in the living room.
The small bench is in the garden.
